## CheatReader v0.1.19

### Highlights
- Added an always-on-top behavior update: new users now start with always-on-top off by default, and can manually enable it in the control panel.
- Added foreground recovery for desktop activation so clicking the taskbar/Dock icon brings the reader back to the front.
- Improved import cleanup by compacting excessive consecutive blank lines, reducing large empty gaps in imported content.

### Notes
- Blank-line compaction now applies consistently in normalized import output across supported formats, including txt/docx/pdf flows.
- Existing saved always-on-top preferences are preserved for current users.
- Added and updated automated tests for window behavior and import normalization.
